subject: Re: February campaign performance - not happy
snippet: Alex, I've just reviewed the February report and conversions are down 34% month-on-month. We're paying £18K/month for this and I need to understand what happened before the board meeting on Monday. Can we get on a call tomorrow? This needs sorting urgently.

subject: Senior media buyer interviews - my recommendation
snippet: Finished the final round interviews yesterday. My top pick is Priya Sharma - 6 years experience, strong on PMax and YouTube, currently at a Leeds agency managing £800K/month in spend. Second choice is Tom Hadley, great Google Ads fundamentals but less cross-channel. Happy to chat through it this afternoon.

subject: Interested in your Google Ads services
snippet: We're a B2B SaaS company based in London doing about £3M ARR and currently spending £25K/month on Google Ads in-house. Results have plateaued and we're looking for an agency partner. Found you through the Google Partner directory. Could we set up a discovery call next week?

subject: Your March P&L is ready to review
snippet: Your Profit & Loss report for March 2026 has been generated and is ready to review. Revenue: £118,400. Expenses: £82,200. Net Profit: £36,200. View the full breakdown in Xero.

subject: Heads up - Bayside Dental might churn
snippet: I've sent Bayside Dental three emails and left two voicemails over the past fortnight and haven't heard back. Their contract renewal is due 1 April. Last time we spoke, Dr Patel mentioned they were reviewing costs across the board. Want me to escalate?

subject: Performance reviews due by 21 March
snippet: You have 4 team member performance reviews due by 21 March. Incomplete: Rachel Thompson, Tom Bradshaw, Jade Kim, Sam Morrison. Log in to BrightHR to complete your assessments.

subject: Referral - e-commerce brand looking for PMax help
snippet: Alex, I've got a client on my book who's spending about £15K/month and struggling with PMax asset group structure. They're a homeware brand based in Birmingham. Would you be open to an intro? They're looking to move agencies by end of March.

subject: Invitation to speak at Brighton SEO 2026
snippet: We'd love to invite you to present at Brighton SEO on 9-10 October 2026. We're looking for a session on AI-driven PPC management for agencies. Speaker package includes full conference pass, travel, and hotel. Deadline to confirm: 28 March.

subject: Your annual plan expires on 31 March
snippet: Your SEMrush Business plan (£380/month billed annually) expires on 31 March 2026. Renew before expiry to lock in your current rate. Prices increase 15% for new subscriptions from 1 April.

subject: Google Ads rolls out new AI-powered bidding controls
snippet: Google announced expanded AI bidding controls for PMax campaigns including channel-level bid adjustments and new audience signal options. Plus: Microsoft Ads launches its competitor to Demand Gen, and the latest on cookie deprecation timelines.
